news.t: VanEck Launches SMHC, Offering Pure-Play Access to China's Semiconductor Build-Out

holdings.infoBox: SMHC is an equity ETF with a total of 28 individual holdings. The top holdings are Yuan Renminbi Offshore stock at 105.24%, Cambricon Technologies Corporation at 8.56%, Hygon Information Technology at 7.82%, Us Dollar at 6.92%, and Eoptolink Technology Inc. at 6.19%.

overview.description: The VanEck China Semiconductor ETF (SMHC) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MarketVector China Semiconductor 25 index. The fund is passively managed, tracking a narrow index of the largest and most liquid Chinese companies in the semiconductor industry. SMHC was launched on Jun 23, 2026 and is issued by VanEck.
